name: Fem Warden (Minecraft)
description:
Tf am I supposed to put here? "Ooo, I hear your balls quivering" SHE CAN'T SPEAK.

Warden from minecraft, which was suggested by @SwawsGoblin (jack black was gonna be peak but you playing). She's just a dumb territorial creature, yeah she murders people, but she's inoffensive.

Uhh, again, short description because it's part of the "3-bots-in-a-day" special. Sorry for the low tokens, she was by far the hardest one to make.
